name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: Houston PLS Check Cashers at 6890C Monroe Rd offers 24-hour check cashing and money transfer services in TX.
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers at 6890C Monroe Rd in Houston, TX operates as a standalone check cashing store. This Houston location serves the East side of the city and is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Whether you need to cash a paycheck at 2 AM or on Sunday morning, this PLS Check Cashers location in Houston is ready to serve you.

At this Houston, TX address, PLS Check Cashers provides check cashing, money orders, bill payments, and other financial services. Call +1 713-944-3333 to speak with staff about your specific needs or to confirm service availability.

For Houston residents needing urgent cash services, bring a valid government-issued ID and your check or documents for the transaction. This 24-hour convenience makes PLS Check Cashers a reliable choice for time-sensitive financial needs.
pros: Open 24/7, 365 days a year — all services available at any hour
Illinois DMV services (registration, title transfers, license plates) co-located with financial services
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard available for unbanked customers with mobile app
Ria Money Transfer available for international remittances
On-site notary services for wills, deeds, trusts, and power of attorney documents
Foreign currency exchange available at check cashing locations
12-state physical network with stores in major urban markets
cons: No fee schedule published on the website — customers must call or visit to learn costs before transacting
Check cashing fees are structurally more expensive than using a free bank or credit union account
Vehicle and DMV services appear to be Illinois-specific; not available in all states
No online or mobile transaction capability — all services require an in-person branch visit
Xpectations! prepaid card carries typical prepaid card fees; not a substitute for a full bank account
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals who need to cash payroll, government, or insurance checks immediately
Illinois residents who need DMV services (registration, title transfer) combined with financial transactions in one trip
Workers and families needing to send international money transfers via Ria
Anyone requiring financial services or notary access outside traditional banking hours
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best suited for unbanked consumers who need immediate cash access, Illinois residents combining DMV and financial errands, or anyone requiring 24/7 financial services outside bank hours. The primary caveat is cost — check cashing fees are materially higher than a free bank account, and PLS does not disclose its fee schedule online, making upfront cost comparison impossible without calling or visiting.
meta_description: PLS Check Cashers at 6890C Monroe Rd, Houston, TX. 24-hour check cashing and money services.
